key: We have a room on the eighth floor with a harbour view. Here is your key card.

key: What time do I have to check out?

key: Yes, it is on the ground floor, next to reception.

key: You have to check out by eleven. Breakfast and wifi are included in the amenities.
text: You have to check out by eleven. Breakfast and wifi are included in the amenities.

key: Welcome to the Sydney Harbour Hotel. Your room is ready on the eighth floor. To use the lift, please tap your key card. Breakfast is served from seven to ten in the main restaurant. You have to check out by eleven a m. If you need anything, please call reception. We hope you enjoy your stay.
